message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for ingest, policy (+54) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

ingest: +28 tests — PaneFingerprint Debug/Clone/Hash/is_same_generation,
  ObservationDecision Debug/Clone/eq/accessors, PanePriorityOverride
  Debug/Clone/serde (with and without expiry), DiscoveryDiff default/debug/
  clone/change_count, PaneCursor from_seq/last_seq/debug/clone,
  CapturedSegment Debug/Clone/eq, CapturedSegmentKind eq variants,
  PersistedCapture Debug/Clone, ShellState default/is_at_prompt all
  variants/is_command_running/Copy, AltScreenChange Debug/Clone/Copy/eq,
  Osc133Marker Debug/Clone/Copy/eq, OverflowPolicy Copy/eq/default,
  StreamChannelConfig default, StreamEvent Debug/Clone/eq, hex_encode
  empty/known, trim_utf8_tail edges

policy: +26 tests — ActionKind Debug/Clone/Copy/eq/Hash/serde all variants/
  as_str all 18/is_mutating/is_destructive, ActorKind Debug/Copy/Hash/serde
  all 4/is_trusted, RiskCategory Debug/Copy/Hash/serde, RiskScore zero/serde,
  PolicyDecision allow eq/serde roundtrip, RateLimitHit Debug/Clone/reason
  global + per-pane, RateLimitOutcome Debug/Clone/is_allowed,
  Redactor Debug/default/no_secrets_passthrough, SendTextAuditSummary
  Debug/Clone/serde + skip_none, RuleEvaluationResult Debug/Clone,
  glob_match edges (empty/star/question)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
